LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GENE ROLAND'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-568172, CGC-18-568278 WITH CASE CGC-18-567976.DEFENDANT GENE ROLAND'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASE 567976 WITH CASES 568172 AND 568278 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE THREE CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. THE LEAD CASE IS CASE 567976 AND ALL FURTHER PAPERS IN ALL THREE CASES MUST NOW BE FILED ONLY IN THE LEAD CASE. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JANUARY 16, 2019 IN 567976 NOW APPLIES TO ALL THREE CASES. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCES PREVIOUSLY SET FOR DECEMBER 19, 2018 AND DECEMBER 26, 2018 IN 568172 AND 568278 ARE NOW VACATED. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-568172, CGC-18-568278 WITH CASE CGC-18-567976
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GENE ROLAND'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-568172, CGC-18-568278 WITH CASE CGC-18-567976.

Defendant Gene Roland's motion to consolidate case 567976 with cases 568172 and 568278 is granted. No opposition filed. The three cases are consolidated for all purposes. The lead case is case 567976 and all further papers in all three cases must now be filed only in the lead case. The case management conference set for January 16, 2019 in 567976 now applies to all three cases. The case management conferences previously set for December 19, 2018 and December 26, 2018 in 568172 and 568278 are now vacated.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
